name: unity-cli-plugin
description: CLI integration for Unity C# Console — drive Unity Editor/Player from skills

interface.shortDescription: Drive the Unity Editor/Player from the CLI
interface.longDescription: A thin Python CLI that talks to the Unity C# Console HTTP service. Run built-in framework commands (GameObject/component/scene/prefab/asset/material/screenshot/profiler), execute raw C# in the live Editor, refresh/recompile, and use a self-evolving library of reusable C# snippets.
defaultPrompt: Create a cube at the origin in the open scene
